description_long: This is an American football with a classic pro design, featuring a brown textured leather surface and prominent white laces along the seam. The front displays the NFL shield logo in gold and black, flanked by the Wilson brand name and the words 'Official' and 'Professional Composite.' The football has a pebbled, grippy surface for enhanced handling and control. The ends are pointed, and the overall shape is an elongated spheroid, typical of regulation footballs. The stitching and lacing are clearly visible, providing both structural integrity and tactile feedback for throwing.
description: A brown, textured NFL football with white laces, gold-and-black NFL logo, and Wilson branding, featuring a grippy, pebbled surface.
description_view_0: Front view showing the NFL shield logo, Wilson branding, and white laces prominently.
description_view_1: End view highlighting the pointed tip, visible seam, and partial lacing.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the uninterrupted brown leather surface and the laces at the top.
description_view_3: Opposite end view with Wilson branding and the seam, showing the laces from a different angle.
